src: An expense tracker web application that helps users record, manage, and visualize their daily expenses. Users can add income and expenses, categorize transactions, and track spending over time through an intuitive and responsive interface.
ja: 日々の支出の記録・管理・可視化を支援するWebアプリ。収入・支出の追加、取引のカテゴリ分け、直感的でレスポンシブなインターフェースによる支出の経時追跡が可能。
